mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_product_rating (user_id, product_id, rating, browse_score, cart_score, favorite_score, buy_score, comment_score, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{weight}, CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'browse' THEN #{weight} ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'cart' THEN #{weight} ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'favorite' THEN #{weight} ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'buy' THEN #{weight} ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'comment' THEN #{weight} ELSE 0 END, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE browse_score = CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'browse' THEN browse_score + #{weight} ELSE browse_score END, cart_score = CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'cart' THEN cart_score + #{weight} ELSE cart_score END, favorite_score = CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'favorite' THEN favorite_score + #{weight} ELSE favorite_score END, buy_score = CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'buy' THEN buy_score + #{weight} ELSE buy_score END, comment_score = CASE WHEN #{actionType} = 'comment' THEN comment_score + #{weight} ELSE comment_score END, rating = LEAST(5, browse_score + cart_score + favorite_score + buy_score + comment_score), update_time = NOW()
